title: Write Gherkin scenarios for maintenance
description: Scenarios for: tsk validate (malformed JSON, workflow violations, hierarchy violations, dangling references), tsk stats (count by type/status, averages).
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Replaced placeholder maintenance.feature with @wip scenarios for tsk validate and tsk stats (totals and type counts). Left @wip to avoid enforcing until implementation.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran python -m behave and spec parity check after adding @wip maintenance scenarios; active specs still pass and parity remains Feature 89, Python 89, Rust 89.
